notes: Default mode is auto: Codex CLI when installed, then Claude Code, then prompt-only.
Set AGENT_PROVIDER, AGENT_COMMAND, --provider, --command, or --argv to override automatic selection.
Adapter runs are recorded under orchestration/reports/agent-runs and state.json agent_runs.

auto.description: Automatically use Codex CLI when installed, then Claude Code, then prompt-only.

claude-code.description: Use a locally installed Claude Code command in non-interactive print mode. Override command if your CLI invocation differs.

codex-cli.description: Use a locally installed Codex CLI command. Override command if your CLI invocation differs.

codex-subagent.description: Prepare prompts for Codex Desktop or MCP subagent dispatch. Set command only if a local subagent CLI bridge exists.

command.description: Run AGENT_COMMAND or --command as argv parsed with shlex; prompt is sent on stdin.

custom-command.description: Operator-supplied command parsed with shlex; prompt is sent on stdin.

prompt-only.description: Prepare prompts and record adapter runs without invoking an external agent.
